blocks.content: Jonathan ran the first route clean. Nobody said anything — but a few of the other kids looked at each other. That look that means: okay. That's what we're dealing with.
Second route. He caught it one-handed in stride without breaking speed. Coach Briggs wrote something down. Didn't look up.
Third route. Jonathan ran it so fast the corner who was supposed to cover him was still turning when the ball arrived. The corner was a junior.
That was all Marcus said. But the whole line heard it.
That was the whole review. Good. From Coach Briggs, that was apparently everything.
Jonathan jogged back to the line next to me. He wasn't breathing hard. I hate that about him.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Your turn is coming. Speed group. Just run straight. Don't think.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Your legs already know. Your brain is the one that's gonna slow you down.
